description_long: This object is a fictional spacecraft with a spherical central cockpit flanked by two large, hexagonal vertical wings. The cockpit is detailed with panel lines and a prominent circular window at the front, while the rear features a red, illuminated exhaust port. The wings are flat, dark, and bordered by a lighter frame, giving the vehicle a menacing and angular silhouette. The structure appears to be made primarily of metal, with some glass or transparent material for the cockpit window. The overall design is sleek and utilitarian, with no visible landing gear or traditional airplane features. The vehicle's aesthetic is reminiscent of science fiction, with a focus on intimidation and agility.
description: A dark, spherical-cockpit spacecraft with large vertical hexagonal wings and a glowing red rear exhaust, featuring a sleek, metallic finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the spherical cockpit with a circular window and the two large, vertical hexagonal wings.
description_view_1: Side view dominated by the flat, hexagonal wing, with the cockpit and central body mostly obscured.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the red, illuminated exhaust port and the symmetrical arrangement of the wings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with the flat, hexagonal wing in full display.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with large, flat, vertical hexagonal wings; no winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles; distinctive for its vertical orientation.
attribute_engine_type: Single rear-mounted jet engine, visible as a circular exhaust at the back.
attribute_tail_design: No conventional tail; stabilization is provided by the large vertical wings, with no separate vertical or horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Central, spherical, enclosed cockpit located at the midpoint of the fuselage; appears to be single-seat with a prominent front window.
